name: Ticker Universe Sync
description: Weekly (Sunday 6 PM ET): Fetches S&P 500 and NASDAQ 100 constituents from Financial Modeling Prep API. Upserts to PostgreSQL tickers table and Neo4j Company nodes with sector/industry relationships.

parameters.content:
## Ticker Universe Sync

Required: httpHeaderAuth (FMP API Key), postgresApi, neo4j
APIs: FMP /api/v3/sp500_constituent, /api/v3/nasdaq_constituent

parameters.query: INSERT INTO tickers (ticker,company_name,sector,industry,exchange,index_membership,is_active,last_updated) VALUES ('{{$json.ticker}}','{{$json.company_name}}','{{$json.sector}}','{{$json.industry}}','{{$json.exchange}}',ARRAY[{{$json.index_membership.map(i=>"'"+i+"'").join(',')}}],true,NOW()) ON CONFLICT (ticker) DO UPDATE SET company_name=EXCLUDED.company_name,sector=EXCLUDED.sector,industry=EXCLUDED.industry,index_membership=EXCLUDED.index_membership,is_active=true,last_updated=NOW();

MERGE (c:Company {ticker:$ticker}) SET c.name=$name,c.exchange=$exchange,c.lastUpdated=datetime() WITH c MERGE (s:Sector {name:$sector}) MERGE (c)-[:BELONGS_TO_SECTOR]->(s) WITH c MERGE (i:Industry {name:$industry}) MERGE (c)-[:BELONGS_TO_INDUSTRY]->(i);
